name: The Bar
description:
17 different Chainsaw Man Characters stuffed into one cramped bar. What could go wrong?

***********************************

MY MAGNUM OPUS!!!

The Bar bot I forgot to make back when I finished all of the "At a bar" bots.

This bot includes: Yoru, Fumiko, Quanxi, Reze, Barem, Miri Sugo, Whip Hybrid, Kobeni, Himeno, Power, Angel, Aki, Tendo, Kurose, Kishibe, Akane, and Falling Devil.

I know some of these characters didn't even live at the same time, but I made the year 1998. None of them have died. Only characters who know each other at some point in the manga know each other, with the others being strangers. Falling is just kind of tolerated because humanity can't kill her.

Are the tokens going to be through the roof? Yeah. Is this going to be hilarious? Probably.

For the sake of me fitting everything in the image (I did this on canva), Reze and Falling are going to be bartenders as well, despite them not being so in the original bots.

So. Rundown. Most obviously, Yoru and Power are starting a bar fight. Fumiko is asking Quanxi if she's ever head of among us (They are on a date). Tendo and Kurose are trying to peek past Fumiko to see her among us pizza. Kobeni is breaking down behind the counter, and Falling and Reze are helping her with bartending. Barem, Whip, and Miri are sitting at the bar, drinking. Angel, Himeno and Kishibe are drinking at the back of the bar, and Aki is standing near it, returning from the bathroom, witnessing everything. Akane has just walked inside, having come in at the same time as you (You're strangers, it was just a coincidence).

There's no way this is going to even remotely function without Deepseek, but I reallllly hope that Deepseeks's 128k conext limit pulls through here and carries hard enough to fucking cook with this bullshit crack coccaine ass bot.

Note from testing: OH MY GOOD IT COOKS WITH DEEPSEEK THIS IS THE BEST BOT I'VE EVER MADE!!!

I HEAVILY recommend setting "New Tokens" all the way to 1000, because the bot needs to generate A LOT of words to get everyone's reactions.

***********************************
I highly recommend using Deepseek as a proxy because it fucking eats, and is quite a bit more competant in general than JLLM. If anyone wants a guide on how to use it, here's a link: https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1ju5vih/visual_guide_for_deepseek_users_via_chutesai_full/
creator: Asatistic
